command:
echo "=== STEP 1: grant git traverse on /home/jose ==="
sudo chmod o+x /home/jose
ls -la /home/ | grep jose

echo "=== STEP 2: chown gitea data to git ==="
sudo chown -R git:git /home/jose/gitea
ls -lah /home/jose/gitea/
ls -lah /home/jose/gitea/data/

echo "=== STEP 3: backup app.ini ==="
sudo -u git cp /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini.bak
echo "backup done"

echo "=== STEP 4: fix Docker /data/ paths in app.ini ==="
sudo -u git sed -i "s|/data/|/home/jose/gitea/data/|g" /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini
echo "sed done"

echo "=== STEP 5: verify key paths ==="
grep -E "WORK_PATH|^ROOT |APP_DATA_PATH|^PATH |ROOT_PATH|PROVIDER_CONFIG|LFS_PATH|INDEXER" /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini

echo "=== STEP 6: restart gitea ==="
sudo systemctl restart gitea
sleep 6
sudo systemctl status gitea --no-pager -l

echo "=== STEP 7: journal ==="
sudo journalctl -u gitea -n 20 --no-pager
